testcase.name: test_concurrent_launch_returns_409_if_running

skipped.message: No job currently running — concurrent guard cannot be tested deterministically without launching a new one.

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration27_launch.py:90: No job currently running — concurrent guard cannot be tested deterministically without launching a new one.

testcase.name: test_launch_on_fresh_site_returns_job_id

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='senior-france.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=45)

testcase.failure:
